author: 阿兰泰(arantai)
original:
[1p] wesimburengge,

[2p] aha arantai i gingguleme wesimburengge, donjibume wesimbure jalin, aha arantai bi, ningguta i meiren i janggin irentai i sasa hafan cooha be gaifi, duin biyai ice jakūn de ningguta ci jurafi, julergi mederi i yaran, siren, uhū bira, wangcing pusung, fujin, dadzošu, juci birai jergi babe, akūmbume baicaci, ere jergi ba, julergi mederi ci sandalabuhangge emu minggan duin sunja tanggū ba funcembi, somime tomoho urse gemu usin tarici ojoro, nimaha butaci ojoro birai angga i bade, sunja ninggun ba ci juwan udu ba de isitala, adali akū boo tobo

[3p] arafi son son i tehebi, jafaha weilengge niyalma be ciralame beideci, ceni dolo umai gebu colo bisire dalaha niyalma akū, aha be, ningguta ci jurafi, muren bira ci deribume, juci bira de isibume uheri jafaha weilengge niyalma duin tanggū juwan du인, esei bisire boo tobo be wacihiyame tuwa sindafi, fehuteci acara usin be yooni fehutefi, anja, šolonggo, sacikū jergi jaka be gemu tantame efulefi, bele, jeku, maikan, miyoocan, weihu, asu, morin, ihan, indahūn be yooni baicame bargiyafi, ninggun biyai orin sunja de yaran de amasi bederehebi, te amasi genere de, kemuni ujimi, ši teo ho, cimen bira, mayan bira,

[4p] g’an ho birai jergi babe dasame narhūšame baicafi, huncun i bade isitala akūmbume baicara be dahame, yooni baicame wajifi ningguta de isinaha manggi, baicaha ele ba, tuwa sindaha, fehutehe boo usin, jafaha weilengge niyalmai narhūn ton be, ilgame faksalame encu donjibume wesimbureci tulgiyen, ne jafaha weilengge niyalma be emke emken i sibkime beideci, ere aniya tucike šandung ni irgen yang hiyo i jergi gūsin duin niyalma, tuweri hetuhe jyli i irgen cen jiyūn i jergi uyun niyalmai jabunde, ceni funde anggala i bele be tucibume benjire, aciha be karun ci sindame dulembure de, gemu ningguta i gūsai niyalma moo sydase, sioi

[5p] dadase, sani, tu halangga hafan i jui tu, dadase, sandase, jungsiboo, liyang halangga hafan i jui liyang dadase, fu cidase, mingfu, badase, yarani, alban i toksoi haha sun el pang dzi sede baime gisurefi, emu aciha de ilan yan, duin yan, sunja yan adali akū menggun bufi, gio meifehen, malhūri, niyehe, weren taktunggi i jergi ba i karun tehe hafan, cooha de ulintufi, cembe sindafi dulembuhe sembime, girin ula i yung gi jeo i hoidzi irgen ša hang ni jergi duin niyalmai jabunde, huncun i uksin semkio, inde uyunju yan menggun edelehe turgunde, morin, ihan, boso, ufa, gūlha i jergi jaka be fangkabume

[6p] bufi, yan doo dzi i baci imbe fudeme tucibuhe, girin ula i uksin sisantai i booi niyalma asantai i jabunde, ini beye abkai wehiyehe i uyuci aniya ini ejen sisantai de alafi, suhecen karun ci ukame tucifi siren i bade juwe aniya tuweri hetuhe, ini takara huncun i uksin fuda i booi niyalma geol, girin ula i uksin yehelde i booi niyalma baši se, aniyadari mederi ci bele ufa i jergi jaka be weihu de tebufi gajifi hūdašambi, jyli i irgen wang san i jabunde, ini beye ajige uhū birai bade jakūn aniya tuweri hetuhe, ningguta i malhūri tokso de tehe nure uncara puseli neihe irgen lii šeng jy,

[7p] aniyadari bele i jergi jaka be gajifi orhoda hūlašafi gamambi, šandung ni irgen wei pei ki jergi ilan niyalmai jabunde, ceni bisire weihu serengge, huncun i nenehe tušan i gūsai da i booi niyalma fudase, bošokū derhude i boode tehe ceni emu ba i irgen jang guwe yung sede kijimi bufi hūlašafi bahangge, k’ai yuwan i sula manju hūwase i booi niyalma lio da, yenden i sula manju idušan i booi niyalma tsui jing an sei jabunde, ceni ejen hūwase, idušan same cembe hūlhame orhoda gurukini seme tucibuhengge yargiyan seme teisu teisu jabume tucibuhebi, baicaci, julergi

[8p] mederi, dekdenggi i jergi ba i somime tomoho hūlhame orhoda gurure urse be baicame geterembure jalin, duleke aniya ci uthai hafan cooha be tomilame tucibuhe bime, ere aniya geli aha arantai membe tucibufi, harangga jiyanggiyūn ambasai emgi acafi icihiyabure babe, goloi gubci hafan, cooha sarakūngge akū, ere dade, aha meni jurara onggolo geli jiyanggiyūn balingga sede hūlhame orhoda gurume genere urse be seremšeme tuwakiyara cende bele jeku be sirabure jergi jemden be giyarime baicarangge karun ci oyonggo ningge akū, erebe karun sindara ele ba i hafan cooha de bireme ulhibume selgiyefi, erin akū saikan seremšeme ciralame baicame jafabukini, aika

[9p] kemuni nenehe songkoi hūsutuleme baicame jafarakū, eici ulin gaifi derencume dulembure jergi jemden turgun bici mende nambuha manggi, urunakū gebu be jorime wakalame wesimbumbi seme ciralame afabuha bime, gio meifehen i jergi ba i karun sindara hafan cooha umai ciralame baicame jafarakū, elemangga uhei sirentufi ulin gaifi hūlhame orhoda gurure ursei aciha sindafi dulembuhengge, yargiyan i fafun be daburakū yabuha bime, uksin semkio, hoidzi ša hang de morin ihan fangkabume bufi fudeme tucibuhe, uksin fuda, yehelde, sisantai, sula hūwase, idušan se, booi niyalma be cihai sindafi fafulaha bade genefi hūdašame yabubuha, hūlhame orhoda gurubuhe, irgen lii

[10p] šeng jy, bele i jergi jaka be fafulaha bade gamafi somime tomoho, urse be sirabume orhoda hūlašaha, fudase, jang guwe yung, aisi be kiceme wei pei ki sede, weihu hūlašame bufi fafulaha bade unggihengge, gemu ambula fafun be jurcehebi, aikabade ere jergi urse be ciralame weile arafi geren de targacun oburakū oci, jemden hacin be ainaha seme geterembume muterakū be dahame, aha bahaci, beidefi encu turgun akū urse be kooli songkoi harangga jiyanggiyūn de benefi icihiyabureci tulgiyen, yang hiyo i jergi susai duin weilengge niyalma be, harangga jiyanggiyūn de bithe unggifi, taka aliyabume horifi, aha i beye ningguta de

[11p] amasi genehe manggi, meiren i janggin namjal i sasa, harangga jiyanggiyūn, meiren i janggisai emgi acafi, baita de holbobuha ele weilengge niyalma be suwaliyame angga acabume getukeleme yargiyalame beidefi weile toktobufi wesimbuki, ere sidende baicame jafaha weilengge niyalmai dorgi, aika geli ere jergi turgun hacin bisirengge bici, inu ere songkoi icihiyaki, jai aha be, dadzošu i baci yaran de amasi jidere de, yaran i hanci yang ba teo geo i jergi bade isinafi, alban i piyoo gaiha niyalma wang ping sebe ucarafi, yoo pai be gaifi niyalma de acabume baicafi, yoo pai bisire urse be an i sindafi unggiheci tulgiyen, fulu

[12p] hafirame tucibuhe orin duin niyalma be gemu baicame jafahabi, wang ping sede adarame fulu niyalma be hafirame tucibuhe babe beideci, wang ping sei jabunde umai ceni udu niyalmai teile waka, piyoo gaiha ele niyalma de gemu emte, juwete adali akū fulu hafirame tucibuhebi seme jabumbi, baicaci, kooli de ilan niyalma acan emu afaha piyoo gaifi, piyoo tome tucibuci acara ilan niyalma de kooli songkoi ilata yoo pai bufi, fung tiyan, girin ula, ningguta i jergi ilan ba i piyoo be fiyanjilara hafan cooha, piyoo i urse be gaifi suhecen karun de isibufi tolome tucibumbime, piyoo gaiha niyalma wang ping se,

[13p] gelhun akū aisi be kiceme teisu teisu emte juwete cisui orhoda gurure niyalma be hafirame tucibuhengge, yargiyan i fafun be necihebi, ede, aha bi uthai hafan cooha be tucibufi, yoo pai akū urse be bireme baicame jafabuki sembihe, damu jing orhoda gurure erin, gurure hūsun sa gemu encu encu samsifi alin weji i šumin bade dosifi orhoda gurunere be dahame, aika hafan cooha be unggifi baicame jafabuci, jingkini piyoo gaiha niyalmai orhoda gurunere be tookabumbime, alban i orhoda afabure erinde isinaha manggi, jalingga ehe urse geli balai kanagan arame lali wacihiyame afaburakū be akū obume muterakū,

[14p] aha i gaifi gajiha duin tanggū hafan cooha be, ilan tanggū tutabufi, jai jergi hiya cebiše de afabufi, hūlhame orhoda gurure ursei somime tomoci ojoro g’an ho, yaran, siren, wangcing, fujin i jergi oyonggo bade dendeme tuweri hetumbume tebufi erin akū seremšeme baicame jafabumbime, ceni bisire boo tobo be gemu tuwa sindaha, gurgušeci ojoro, nimaha butaci ojoro ele ba be yooni hafan cooha de afabufi tuwakiyabuha be dahame, gūnici, ere aniyai hūlhame tucike, jai jafara de sujume jailaha somime tomoho urse, ere sidende udu alin weji i šumin bade somifi hūlhame orhoda gurunecibe, alin sakdaka

[15p] manggi, umai teci ojoro feye akū dade, geli jetere kunesun baharakū ofi, toktofi meni meni jugūn ildun be tuwame hūlhame dosimbi, aikabade, damu karun sindara hafan cooha de akdafi baicame jafabuci, geli fe tacin be songkolome hūsutuleme baicame jafarakū, eici derencume sindafi dulembure be boljoci ojorakū be dahame, aha bahaci, ere sidende an i funcehe emu tanggū hafan cooha be gaifi ciralame baicame jafaraci tulgiyen, ningguta de isinaha manggi, harangga jiyanggiyūn meiren i janggisai emgi acafi narhūšame hebešefi, isingga be tuwame hafan cooha be gaifi, ningguta i meiren i janggin nirentai i sasa gurure hūsun sai

[16p] alin ci bederere onggolo jurafi, ceni toktofi yabure oyonggo jugūn be tosome dendeme tuwakiyabufi ciralame baicame jafaki, kemuni ilan halai meiren i janggin, sahaliyan ula i jiyanggiyūn de bithe unggifi, harangga kadalaha ba i julergi mederi, dekdenggi i jergi bade jugūn hafunara ele ba i hafan cooha de bireme ulhibume selgiyefi, ciralame seremšeme baicame jafabuki, uttu ohode, alban i piyoo gaiha urse baicame jafarangge cira be safi, jai gelhun akū cisui orhoda gurure niyalma be hafirame tuciburakū bime, jafara de jailaha urse inu ukcame muterakū ombi, erei jalin gingguleme

[17p] donjibume wesimbuhe,,

[18p] (coohai nashūn i ambasa gisurefi wesimbu,) abkai wehiyehe i juwan emuci aniya nadan biyai ice uyun,
